original_image_tags: The document is a filled-out "CHECK-LIST - UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS" form. The background is dark with light-colored typed text. The header and footer both contain large, stamped text: "RESTRICTED". In the top right corner, the field "Incident" is filled with "119a". The form fields are numbered 1 through 26. The name of the observer is listed as "withheld". Most data fields (9-12, 14-17, 19-23, 25) are filled with "N/S". The shape of the object is listed as "oval".

elements.description: A typed checklist document titled 'CHECK-LIST - UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS'. It contains 26 numbered fields with details for 'Incident 119a', including 'Date 20 Feb 48', 'Location Aregua - 10 miles east of Asuncion', 'Shape oval', and 'Remarks (over)'. The document is marked 'RESTRICTED' at the top and bottom.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the form title, 'RESTRICTED' stamps, incident number, shape, and overall content, but Description B provides additional specific details like date and location not present in A without contradiction.
